quranMenu.title: Quran
quranMenu.noBookmarksHint: Tap the bookmark icon next to a verse to save it here.
quranMenu.searchSurah: Search surah by name or number
quranMenu.bismillah: In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful

landing.title: A better you.
landing.subtitle: Istiqoma helps you build consistent habits in prayer, good deeds, and self-reflection. Track your journey to become a better believer, one deed at a time.

authChooser.title: How would you like to continue?
authChooser.description: Choose a sign in method to start tracking your deeds. Both work for new and returning users.

landing.featuresSubtitle: A comprehensive suite of tools designed to help you balance worldly life with your spiritual obligations.

features.dzikirDesc: Digital tasbih with haptic feedback. Track your daily remembrance of Allah with ease.
features.quranDesc: Set personalized reading goals. Track pages, Juz, or time spent reflecting on the Holy Book.
features.analyticsDesc: Visualize your spiritual growth. Identify areas for improvement with gentle, data-driven insights.
features.remindersDesc: Never miss a Salah. Get timely notifications for prayers and your spiritual goals.
features.targetsDesc: Set meaningful targets for worship. Track your consistency and build lasting habits.
features.communityDesc: Join global challenges for fasting, Dhikr, or charity. Compete in goodness (Khair).
features.badgesDesc: Earn points, streaks, badges, and rankings through spiritual achievements to encourage you to stay consistent.
features.privacyDesc: Your deeds are between you and Allah alone. We never share your spiritual journey with anyone.

personalize.title: Personalize your worship goals
personalize.subtitle: Customize your dashboard to focus on the habits you want to build right now. Start with the obligatory (Fard), then gradually add voluntary ones (Sunnah) as your spiritual growth progresses.
personalize.benefit1: Smart reminders based on your location and calendar.
personalize.benefit2: Privacy first. Your deeds are between you and Allah.
personalize.benefit3: Offline capable for when you disconnect to reconnect.

testimonial.quote: Istiqoma didn't just help to get consistent worshipping Allah every day, it also gave me a visual representation of my relationship with my faith.
testimonial.name: Yahya Pramudya Ekananta

landing.downloadAppDesc: Install Istiqoma on your device for quick access

dashboard.subtitle: What good deeds have you done today?
dashboard.startRecording: Start tracking your good deeds to see your progress over time.
dashboard.noTargetsYet: Set spiritual goals to track your progress automatically

dekat-allah: "The most beloved of deeds to Allah are those done consistently, even if they are few." — Sahih al-Bukhari
"Whoever draws near to Me by a hand's span, I draw near to him by an arm's length." — Hadith Qudsi
"And He is with you wherever you are." — Quran 57:4
"Allah does not burden a soul beyond that it can bear." — Quran 2:286
bermanfaat: "The best of people are those most beneficial to people." — Al-Mu'jam al-Awsat
"Charity does not decrease wealth, and forgiving others only adds to one's honour." — Sahih Muslim
"A kind word is charity." — Sahih al-Bukhari
"Do good deeds, even if they are small — for you do not know which deed will enter you into Paradise." — Ibn Majah
"Whoever removes a worldly hardship from a believer, Allah will remove one of their hardships on the Day of Judgement." — Sahih Muslim
berilmu: "Seeking knowledge is an obligation upon every Muslim." — Sunan Ibn Majah
"Allah elevates those who believe among you and those given knowledge, in degrees." — Quran 58:11
"The scholars are the heirs of the Prophets." — Sunan Abu Dawud
"Say: My Lord, increase me in knowledge." — Quran 20:114
"Whoever treads a path in search of knowledge, Allah makes easy for him a path to Paradise." — Sahih Muslim
istiqomah: "Indeed, those who say 'Our Lord is Allah' and then remain steadfast — the angels descend upon them." — Quran 41:30
"The most beloved deeds to Allah are those done consistently, even if small." — Sahih al-Bukhari
"Be steadfast as you have been commanded." — Quran 11:112
"Whoever is patient, Allah will make him patient. No one can be given a blessing better or greater than patience." — Sahih al-Bukhari
"The deed most loved by Allah is the one done consistently, even if it is little." — Sahih Muslim
keluarga: "The best of you are those who are best to their families." — Sunan al-Tirmidhi
"Every one of you is a shepherd, and every one of you is responsible for his flock." — Sahih al-Bukhari
"Your family has a right over you." — Sahih al-Bukhari
"Whoever believes in Allah and the Last Day should treat his neighbour with generosity." — Sahih al-Bukhari
"A father's kindness to his child is better than giving a sa' in charity." — Sunan al-Tirmidhi

qibla.step2: The green arrow points toward the Kaaba in Mecca

summary.motivationHigh: Mashaa Allah! You are very consistent. Keep up this great habit!

summary.motivationLow: Every deed counts, no matter how small. Let's make it a habit, one day at a time.

streak.title: Streak
streak.motivationalMessage: You are consistent in doing good deeds today. Keep it up being Istiqomah every single day!

streakDetail.title: Streak

streakDetail.dayFrozenSubtitle: A streak freezer kept this day alive
streakDetail.dayEmpty: No deeds were logged on this day.
streakDetail.frozenBody: You didn't log a deed on this day, but a streak freezer was used automatically to keep your streak going.

streakFreezer.title: Streak Freezer
streakFreezer.howItWorksDescription: Buy freezers with your points. When a past day in your streak has no recorded deed, one freezer is automatically used to keep the streak alive. Today is never auto-frozen — you still have time to log a deed.
streakFreezer.noFrozenDays: No days have been frozen yet. Your streak is on solid ground.
streakFreezer.refundedByBackdate: Refunded — you logged a deed for this day
streakFreezer.autoConsumedToastDescription_one: A freezer was automatically used to save {{dates}}. Log a deed on that day to get it back.
streakFreezer.autoConsumedToastDescription_other: Freezers were automatically used to save {{dates}}. Log a deed on those days to get them back.
streakFreezer.refundToastDescription: Your streak freezer for {{date}} was returned to your balance.
streakFreezer.insufficientPointsDescription: Earn more points by recording good deeds, then try again.

recommendations.entryDesc: See personalized suggestions based on your onboarding answers, each backed by a verse from the Quran or an authentic hadith.
recommendations.disclaimer: These are AI-generated suggestions grounded in the Quran and authentic hadith from Sahih al-Bukhari and Sahih Muslim. Always verify with a trusted scholar.
recommendations.errorDesc: Please try again in a moment.
recommendations.empty: No suggestions are available right now.

onboarding.bismillahMeaning: In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful

s1.headline:
Your companion on
becoming better
s1.subtext: Istiqoma is an app that helps you record your daily good deeds — not as an obligation, but as a mirror of the soul.

a.title: Record Spontaneous Good Deeds
a.desc: No targets needed. Simply record any small kindness you do today.

b.title: End-of-Day Reflection
b.desc: Gently reminded in the evening to reflect on the day that has passed.

c.title: See Your Journey
c.desc: Your record of deeds becomes the story of you growing as a Muslim.

s2.headline:
Benefits you
will feel

a.title: A Calmer Heart
a.desc: Awareness of your deeds makes your heart more grateful

b.title: A New Identity
b.desc: Slowly build yourself as a Muslim who is istiqomah

c.title: Meaningful Worship
c.desc: Every small deed feels meaningful and beautifully recorded

d.title: Consistency
d.desc: Helped to stay consistent without feeling burdened

s2.hadithText: "Verily, the most beloved deeds to Allah are the most consistent ones."

q1.question: How is your worship right now?
q1.hint: Pick what most honestly describes you

options.pemula: Just starting to learn and want to do better
options.naik-turun: Up and down, struggling to stay consistent
options.cukup-baik: Already fairly regular, want more istiqomah
options.tingkatkan: Want to raise the overall quality of my worship

q2.question: What most often holds you back from doing more good?
q2.hint: Be honest — there are no wrong answers

options.lupa: I often forget or miss the opportunity
options.males: I know what to do, but feel lazy doing it
options.tidak-tahu: I don't know what daily good deeds I could do
options.sibuk: Busyness leaves me no time to reflect

q3.question: Which deeds do you want to focus on?
q3.hint: Pick as many as you like — at least 1

q4.question: When is the best time to reflect on your day?
q4.hint: We'll send a reminder at this time

options.subuh: After Subuh — set the day with good intent
options.isya: After Isya — close the day with gratitude

q5.question: I want to be known as a Muslim who is…
q5.hint: This is the identity you'll build together with Istiqoma

dekat-allah.label: Close to Allah
dekat-allah.sublabel: Worship feels light, the heart always connected

bermanfaat.label: Beneficial to others
bermanfaat.sublabel: My presence brings real impact to those around me

berilmu.label: Knowledgeable and wise
berilmu.sublabel: Always learning and practising the deen with excellence

istiqomah.label: Istiqomah and steadfast
istiqomah.sublabel: Consistent in good even when no one is watching

keluarga.label: An example in the family
keluarga.sublabel: Being an imam, mother, or child who carries goodness

result.note: This identity isn't a label — it is who you are becoming, one good deed at a time.

dekat-allah.name: A Muslim Close to Allah
dekat-allah.desc: You long for a sincere connection with Allah. Every deed you record in Istiqoma is a real step closer to Him — one kindness at a time.

bermanfaat.name: A Beneficial Muslim
bermanfaat.desc: You believe the best of people are those most beneficial to others. Istiqoma will help you see how much goodness you've already spread.

berilmu.name: A Knowledgeable Muslim
berilmu.desc: You understand that knowledge is light. Istiqoma will accompany you in recording every step of learning and practice — for knowledge without action is a tree without fruit.

istiqomah.name: A Steadfast Muslim
istiqomah.desc: Istiqomah isn't about perfection — it's about not stopping. With Istiqoma, you'll see how consistent you really are, even on the heaviest days.

keluarga.name: A Family Role Model
keluarga.desc: The greatest goodness begins at home. Every deed you plant today is an inheritance for those you love most.

identityFallback.name: A Growing Muslim
identityFallback.desc: Your journey begins today. Every small step you take is proof that you are growing into the best version of yourself.

hint.title: Continue from onboarding
hint.subtitle: You picked these deeds during onboarding. Set targets to begin.

profile.title: Profile
profile.identityNote: Your name, email, and avatar are managed by your Replit Auth account.
profile.usernameHelp: Up to 40 characters. Leave blank to clear.
profile.usernameTaken: That username is already taken. Please pick another.
profile.phoneHelp: Digits, spaces, +, -, ( and ) only. Up to 30 characters.
profile.connectGmailDesc: Link a Google account to your sign-in. You'll be sent to the Replit login screen, where you can choose Google.
profile.journeySubtitleEmpty: Tell us about yourself to personalize Istiqoma
profile.changePinDesc: Your PIN keeps your account safe. Choose 4–8 digits and remember it — it can't be recovered.

dangerZone.heading: Danger Zone
dangerZone.description: These actions are permanent and cannot be undone. Please proceed with care.
dangerZone.dialogDescription: All your data — deeds, targets, bookmarks, memorizations, streaks, and settings — will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.
dangerZone.deleteSuccessDesc: Your account and all data have been permanently removed.

usernameAuth.pinRecoveryWarning: Save the recovery code we'll show after signup — it's the ONLY way to reset a forgotten PIN.
usernameAuth.lockedDescription: Too many wrong PINs. Try again in {{time}} or use your recovery code below.
usernameAuth.recoveryCodeBody: This is the ONLY way to reset your PIN. Save it now — we cannot show it again.

recoveryReset.title: Reset your PIN
recoveryReset.description: Enter your username, recovery code, and a new PIN.
recoveryReset.recoveryCodeHelp: 20 letters/digits. Dashes and case don't matter.
recoveryReset.successBody: Sign in with your new PIN.

errors.invalidCode: Recovery code is invalid or already used.
errors.lockedFor: Recovery locked. Try again in {{minutes}} minute(s).
errors.tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts. Please try again later.

errors.usernameTaken: That username is already taken. Please pick another.
errors.lockedFor: Account locked. Try again in {{minutes}} minute(s).

achievements.heading: Achievements
achievements.loadError: Couldn't load badges. Please refresh the page.
achievements.shareText: I just unlocked the {{tier}} {{name}} badge on Istiqoma! 🏆

sahabat-quran.name: Quran Companion
sahabat-quran.description: Quran reading equivalent in verses (juz × 600, page × 15, surah × 55).

birrul-walidayn.name: Birrul Walidayn

subuh-warrior.name: Subuh Warrior

tahajjud-knight.name: Tahajjud Knight
tahajjud-knight.description: Log Tahajjud prayer on different days.

sleepless-soul.name: Sleepless Soul
sleepless-soul.description: Log worship between 1–4 AM on different days.

full-house.name: Full House
full-house.description: Complete all 5 Fardhu prayers in a single day.

triple-crown.name: Triple Crown
triple-crown.description: Pray, dzikir, and read Quran on the same day.

comeback-kid.name: Comeback Kid
comeback-kid.description: Bounce back after a streak of 7+ days was broken.

freeze-master.name: Freeze Master
freeze-master.description: Streak Freezer successfully saved your streak.

no-freeze-november.name: No Freeze November
no-freeze-november.description: 30-day streak without using a single freezer.

khatam-champion.name: Khatam Champion
khatam-champion.description: Quran reading equivalent to one full khatam.

ramadhan-marathoner.name: Ramadhan Marathoner
ramadhan-marathoner.description: Fardhu fasting (Ramadhan) throughout the month of Ramadhan.

senin-kamis.name: Monday–Thursday
senin-kamis.description: Sunnah fasting on Mondays or Thursdays.

diam-diam-bersedekah.name: Quiet Charity
diam-diam-bersedekah.description: Give charity on 7 different days in a month.

mistake-mechanic.name: Mistake Mechanic
mistake-mechanic.description: Correct a deed entry you've already logged.

midnight-logger.name: Midnight Logger
midnight-logger.description: Log a deed for the previous day (back-dated).

identity-found.name: Identity Found
identity-found.description: Complete onboarding & pick your spiritual identity.

hari-raya-spirit.name: Hari Raya Spirit
hari-raya-spirit.description: Log a deed on Eid al-Fitr or Eid al-Adha.

leaderboard.title: Leaderboard
leaderboard.profileEntrySubtitle: See how you stack up against others
leaderboard.emptyState: No one has earned points in this period yet. Be the first!

recordChooser.title: How would you like to record?
recordChooser.subtitle: Pick how you want to log this deed.
recordChooser.voiceHint: Describe it out loud and we'll fill the form.

voiceCapture.title: Record by voice
voiceCapture.instructions: Tap the microphone, then describe a single deed in your own words. For example: "I prayed Subuh in jamaah this morning."
voiceCapture.processing: Listening to what you said and filling the form…
voiceCapture.permissionDenied: We need microphone permission to record your deed. Please allow it in your browser settings and try again.
voiceCapture.noMicrophone: No microphone was detected on this device.
voiceCapture.noSpeech: We didn't catch anything. Please try again.
voiceCapture.networkError: There was a network problem during transcription. Please try again.
voiceCapture.languageNotSupported: Your current language isn't supported by this browser's voice recognition. Please switch to a supported language or type the deed instead.
voiceCapture.unsupported: Your browser doesn't support voice recognition. Please use a recent version of Chrome, Edge, or Safari, or type the deed instead.
voiceCapture.couldNotUnderstand: We couldn't understand the deed. Please try again or type it instead.
voiceCapture.rateLimited: You've used voice recording a lot recently. Please wait a bit and try again.
voiceCapture.serviceUnavailable: The voice service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again or type the deed instead.
voiceCapture.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
voiceCapture.aborted: Recording was interrupted. Please try again.
voiceCapture.serviceNotAllowed: The voice recognition service was blocked. Please check your browser settings or try again on a different network.
voiceCapture.badGrammar: We couldn't process the speech grammar. Please try again or type the deed instead.
voiceCapture.unknownError: Voice recording failed ({{code}}). Please try again or type the deed instead.
voiceCapture.tooLarge: That recording is too long. Please record a shorter clip.
voiceCapture.reviewToast: Please review your deed before saving it

quiz.title: Islamic Quiz
quiz.leaderboardSubtitle: Ranked by level reached, then total correct answers.
quiz.leaderboardEmpty: No one has earned a quiz score yet. Be the first!
quiz.intro: Each level has 10 multiple-choice questions. Score 10/10 to advance to the next level.
quiz.tryAgainBody: You answered {{correct}} of {{total}} correctly. Score 10/10 to advance.

onboardingSettings.title: Your journey
onboardingSettings.reminderPreview: We'll send your daily reflection reminder around {{time}}.
onboardingSettings.incompleteError: Please answer every question and pick at least one focus.

dashboard.title: Dashboard & Today's Progress
dashboard.description: See all your worship goals for today at a glance. Your progress ring shows how much you've already completed.

recordDeed.title: Record a Good Deed
recordDeed.description: Log any act of worship in seconds — pick a category, describe it, and save. Tap "Save Deed" to try it!

dzikir.title: Dzikir Counter
dzikir.description: Tap the glowing circle to count your dhikr. Try tapping 3 times to see it in action!

sholat.title: Sholat Tracking
sholat.description: Track your 5 daily prayers and mark them complete. Tap "Mark done" on Fajr to try it.

targets.title: Spiritual Targets
targets.description: Set recurring goals for your worship — daily Quran pages, dzikir counts, weekly sadaqah, and more.

quran.title: Quran Journey
quran.description: Read, listen, and track your Quran progress. Pick up exactly where you left off, with bookmarks and memorization tools.

progress.title: Progress & Streaks
progress.description: Watch your spiritual journey unfold — streaks, weekly heatmaps, and charts to keep you motivated day after day.

final.title: Ready to Begin?
final.description: Join thousands of Muslims growing spiritually every day. It's free forever.

finalScreen.title: Start Your Journey
finalScreen.subtitle: Join thousands of Muslims growing spiritually every day.
finalScreen.freeForever: Free forever · No credit card needed

topBar.tryOrSkip: Try it in the screen, or click Continue to skip

community.subtitle: Shared targets you and others work on together.

community.notFound: This community target was not found.
community.onlyCreator: Only the creator can edit this target.
community.youAreCreator: You are the creator of this target.

deeds.recordedDesc: Your deed has been successfully tracked.
deeds.deletedDesc: The deed has been removed from your history.
deeds.updatedDesc: Your deed has been successfully updated.

privacyContact.heading: Privacy Inquiries
privacyContact.body: For questions about your data or this privacy policy, contact us at
privacyContact.responseNote: We respond to all privacy inquiries within 30 days.

consent.title: Data Privacy Consent
consent.body: Istiqoma records your religious practice data to power its core features. Under GDPR (Article 9), this is classified as sensitive personal information, and we need your explicit consent before storing it.

dataTypes.quran: Qur'an reading, bookmarks, and memorization progress

consent.gdprNote: You may withdraw consent at any time by deleting your account. We will never sell or share your religious data with third parties.
consent.checkboxReligious: I consent to Istiqoma storing my religious practice data to power app features
consent.checkboxAge: I confirm I am 13 years of age or older
consent.saveError: Could not save your consent. Please try again.
